subcodes.first_line: The letter of Mulla Muhammad-Baqir - upon him be Bahá'u'lláh - which was addressed to that noble person hath been perused. We make mention of him through that which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه ملا محمد باقر علیه بهاءالله که به آن جناب نوشته ملاحظه شد انا نذکره بما
subcodes.subjects: @humility; meekness; lowliness, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @martyrs and martyrdom, @exhortations and counsels, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @unity in diversity, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @praise and encouragement
